title: limonium afrum
intro: Limonium afrum, also known as African sea lavender, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family and is native to Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Limonium afrum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Limonium afrum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for consumption, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
